title: cleistocactus icosagonus
intro: Cleistocactus icosagonus, also known as the star cactus, is a species of cactus that belongs to the genus Cleistocactus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cleistocactus icosagonus include its potential to treat wounds, burns, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into salves, creams, or infused oils to be applied topically, although further research is needed to fully understand its uses and effects.
